general.condstr: You need at least 40% reputation with the Soromid.
general.description: This launcher is an extensively bioengineered hive of spaceflight-capable single celled organisms. On demand, a pheromone release with a complex biologically encoded target signature will signal the colony's 'defense response', and an amoeba will be released to persue a matching target. It will rupture on contact, releasing a particularly potent soup of bioplasma to melt through the target's hull. The biological systems they use to sense and track their targets are exceptionally difficult to jam through conventional methods. This larger variant of plasmoid amoeba is most effective against slow, armored targets.
